content.query:
--CREATE MASTER KEY ENCRYPTION BY PASSWORD = 'NithyaKonda@1280'

--We have created the password and key using above line

CREATE DATABASE SCOPED CREDENTIAL cred_nithya
WITH IDENTITY = 'Managed Identity'

CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE source_silver
WITH
(
LOCATION = 'https://awstoragedatalakenit.dfs.core.windows.net/silver/',
CREDENTIAL = cred_nithya
)

CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE source_gold
WITH
(
LOCATION = 'https://awstoragedatalakenit.dfs.core.windows.net/gold/',
CREDENTIAL = cred_nithya
)

CREATE EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT format_parquet
WITH(
    FORMAT_TYPE = PARQUET,
    DATA_COMPRESSION = 'org.apache.hadoop.io.compress.SnappyCodec'
)

--CREATING EXTERNAL TABLES

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE gold.fact_sales
WITH(
    LOCATION = 'fact_sales',
    DATA_SOURCE = source_gold,
    FILE_FORMAT = format_parquet
)
AS
SELECT * FROM gold.sales

--Here we are having this data now in gold layer in parquet format, in views we dont save it
--This table data is now in gold container in data lake in extsales 

SELECT * FROM gold.extsales 

--Categories

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE gold.dim_Categories
WITH(
    LOCATION = 'dim_Categories',
    DATA_SOURCE = source_gold,
    FILE_FORMAT = format_parquet
)
AS
SELECT * FROM gold.Categories

--Calender

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE gold.dim_Calender
WITH(
    LOCATION = 'dim_Calender',
    DATA_SOURCE = source_gold,
    FILE_FORMAT = format_parquet
)
AS
SELECT * FROM gold.Calender

--Customers

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE gold.dim_Customers
WITH(
    LOCATION = 'dim_Customers',
    DATA_SOURCE = source_gold,
    FILE_FORMAT = format_parquet
)
AS
SELECT * FROM gold.Customers

--Subcategories

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE gold.dim_Subcategories
WITH(
    LOCATION = 'dim_Subcategories',
    DATA_SOURCE = source_gold,
    FILE_FORMAT = format_parquet
)
AS
SELECT * FROM gold.Subcategories

--Products

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE gold.dim_Products
WITH(
    LOCATION = 'dim_Products',
    DATA_SOURCE = source_gold,
    FILE_FORMAT = format_parquet
)
AS
SELECT * FROM gold.Products

--Returns

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE gold.fact_Returns
WITH(
    LOCATION = 'fact_Returns',
    DATA_SOURCE = source_gold,
    FILE_FORMAT = format_parquet
)
AS
SELECT * FROM gold.Returns

--Territories

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE gold.dim_Territories
WITH(
    LOCATION = 'dim_Territories',
    DATA_SOURCE = source_gold,
    FILE_FORMAT = format_parquet
)
AS
SELECT * FROM gold.Territories
